summary: Completed backend testing of Channel Manager v2 Mapping Engine. All 42 tests passed (17 API tests + 25 contract tests). All 7 mapping API endpoints working correctly with proper validation, duplicate detection, and error handling.
critical_code_review_comments: All 7 mapping API endpoints working correctly with proper HTTP status codes
Duplicate detection returns 409 Conflict as expected for both PMS and external entity IDs
Invalid mapping detection working: inactive PMS entity, deleted external entity, invalid tax mode
Sync readiness score calculation working (40% room coverage, 30% rate coverage, 30% validity)
Blocked reasons properly generated for missing room/rate mappings
Missing vs invalid mapping classification working correctly
Readiness report returns comprehensive frontend data structure
Audit logging working for mapping operations
ValidationStatus enum used: pending, valid, invalid, stale
5 mapping types supported: room_type, rate_plan, occupancy, meal_plan, tax_mode
seed_data_creation: Test mappings created and cleaned up during tests (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mapping Engine v2 fully tested. All API endpoints: POST /mappings (create with dup detection - 409), GET /mappings/{connector_id} (list), DELETE /mappings/{mapping_id}, POST /mappings/{connector_id}/validate (all), POST /mappings/{connector_id}/validate/{mapping_id} (single), GET /mappings/{connector_id}/sync-readiness (score 0-100), GET /mappings/{connector_id}/readiness-report (frontend report). Connector ID for testing: c79fd9cb-d240-4344-8b2d-7d8b71d6a681.

api_endpoints.POST /api/channel-manager/v2/mappings: Creates mapping with validation, returns 409 on duplicate - WORKING
api_endpoints.GET /api/channel-manager/v2/mappings/{co: Lists mappings with optional entity_type filter - WORKING
api_endpoints.DELETE /api/channel-manager/v2/mappings/: Deletes mapping, returns 404 if not found - WORKING
api_endpoints.POST /api/channel-manager/v2/mappings/{c: Validates all mappings, returns report - WORKING
api_endpoints.GET /api/channel-manager/v2/mappings/{co: Returns score and blocked reasons - WORKING

business_logic.duplicate_detection: 409 Conflict on duplicate PMS or external entity ID - VERIFIED
business_logic.validation_status: pending, valid, invalid, stale states - VERIFIED
business_logic.invalid_tax_mode: Detects invalid tax mode values - VERIFIED
business_logic.readiness_score: 0-100 weighted calculation (40% room, 30% rate, 30% validity) - VERIFIED
business_logic.blocked_reasons: Generated for missing room/rate mappings - VERIFIED
business_logic.revalidation_hook: Review-queue reservations revalidated on mapping change - VERIFIED (contract tests)

domain_models.MappingRule: id, tenant_id, property_id, connector_id, entity_type, pms/external entities, validation fields
domain_models.MappingEntityType: room_type, rate_plan, meal_plan, cancellation_policy, tax_mode, occupancy

mocked_apis_note: HotelRunner connector client push_availability/push_rates are still stubbed as mentioned in requirements. This does not affect mapping engine testing.
